manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v67🫴🫴

- You can now save posts as drafts.
- Redesigned the Explore icon.
- Added a search icon in feed reels, direct reels and profile reels so you don't need to leave from the place you are to search for something.
- Redesigned the more button in your stories.
- Redesigned the More options screen in your stories.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
